TOUR BOARD

Events worth following now

Open any card for result status, official sources, field details, viewing angles, and event-specific storylines.

Tour Board →
CompletedMLP

MLP San Diego

Jul 16, 2026 – Jul 19, 2026 · Barnes Tennis Center, San Diego, CA

Dallas Flash completed an undefeated San Diego run by beating Columbus Sliders 3–1 for the Super Sunday Belt. Atlanta Bouncers finished third.

✓Dallas 1st · Columbus 2nd · Atlanta 3rd
Explore event↗
CompletedPPA

PPA Australia 250 Melbourne

Jul 16, 2026 – Jul 19, 2026 · Melbourne, Australia

The event is complete with 398 registered players. Picklary rechecked the official listing on July 20; a stable medal table was still not available in the public view.

✓Completed · official medals pending
Explore event↗
CompletedPPA

Macon PPA Challenger

Jul 17, 2026 – Jul 19, 2026 · Rhythm & Rally, Macon, GA

The Georgia Challenger is complete with 514 registered players. Medal names remain withheld until the official Winners Circle publishes a stable table.

✓Completed · official medals pending
Explore event↗
CompletedMLP

MLP Mid-Season Tournament

Jul 8, 2026 – Jul 12, 2026 · Belknap Park, Grand Rapids, MI

St. Louis Shock swept New Jersey 5s 3–0 for the title; Columbus Sliders beat LA Mad Drops 3–1 for third.

✓St. Louis 1st · New Jersey 2nd · Columbus 3rd
Explore event↗
UpcomingMLP

MLP Chicago

Jul 23, 2026 – Jul 26, 2026 · Life Time North Shore, Northbrook, IL

The next MLP stop brings eleven listed teams to the Chicago area for crucial standings points and a home event for Chicago Slice.

Explore event↗
UpcomingPPA

PPA Asia 500 Singapore Open

Jul 23, 2026 – Jul 26, 2026 · Singapore

The PPA Asia 500 Singapore Open overlaps with the next MLP window, making international field depth and travel choices a key storyline.

Explore event↗
UpcomingMLP

Amway MLP Orlando

Jul 30, 2026 – Aug 2, 2026 · ESPN Wide World of Sports, Orlando, FL

The ninth and final regular-season stop is scheduled indoors at Walt Disney World Resort before the MLP playoffs begin.

Explore event↗

PICKLARY METHOD

Four layers for every tournament

Official results are the starting point; player, partner, season, and analysis layers turn scores into useful context.

01Official result

Champion, finalist, final score, and publication status

02Event context

Format, venue, field size, and season meaning

03Player stories

Breakouts, partnerships, injuries, returns, and rivalries

04What next

Continue to players, rankings, and deeper Picklary analysis

CONFIRMED RESULTS

Events with confirmed champions, finalists, and scores

Names and scores appear only when an official recap has published the finals.

LATEST CONTEXT

Latest pro-tour information

World tournamentsJun 19, 2026

U.S. PPA Tour schedule source

Use the official PPA schedule page for U.S. tour stops, event pages, locations, ticket/registration links, and player-field source checks.

PPAU.S. eventsschedule

Check before acting: Verify date, location, registration deadline, and event divisions at the source.

Verify at source: PPA Tour schedule
ResultsJun 19, 2026

MLP standings and results source

For team competition, Major League Pickleball result and standings pages are useful primary links. Treat live tables as changing information and verify close to publication time.

MLPresultsstandings

Check before acting: Check the original table and its latest update time.

Verify at source: Major League Pickleball standings
internationalJun 19, 2026

PPA Spain and international expansion source

Track non-U.S. tournament and expansion notes separately from U.S. tour stops so international users can find relevant event information faster.

internationalPPAnon-U.S.

Check before acting: When a non-U.S. event page is confirmed, add date, city/country, divisions, registration source, and player-field link.

Verify at source: PPA Tour news

SOURCE POLICY

No guessed results

A completed event remains “official results pending” until its Winners Circle or result table is visible. Only verified names are added to event pages.

Reference source

PPA Tour schedule

Checks: upcoming tournament dates · locations · event pages · registration links

Source
Reference source

PPA Challenger schedule

Checks: challenger tournament dates · locations · points · registration details

Source
Reference source

Major League Pickleball

Checks: team events · schedule · standings · match results

Source
Reference source

Major League Pickleball standings

Checks: standings · season records · playoff race · team results

Source
Reference source

PPA international news and expansion

Checks: non-U.S. tournament pages · international expansion · host cities outside the United States · registration details

Source
